supply_chain.dependencies: Dependence on Flex Ltd. for FLEX and J750 family products manufacturing in Malaysia; Plexus Corp. for Magnum products in Malaysia and Thailand and ETS family in Malaysia; SAM Meerkat for storage test products in Malaysia and Thailand. Global supply shortage of electrical components including semiconductor chips has impacted supply chain.
supply_chain.risks: Supplier delays or cancellations could reduce revenues and earnings. Contract manufacturers may fail to meet quality or delivery requirements. Global supply shortage of electrical components and inflationary cost increases impact ability to meet customer demand. Concentration risk with limited suppliers for certain components. Some components obtained from sole sources.

regulatory_risks: U.S. export control regulations restricting transactions with certain Chinese semiconductor companies
Entity List and Foreign Direct Product Rule (FDP) under U.S. Export Administration Regulations (EAR)
U.S. Department of Commerce export restrictions on advanced semiconductors and equipment to China
Chinese government blocking legislation in response to U.S. export controls
RoHS Directive (Restriction of Use of Certain Hazardous Substances in Electrical and Electronic Equipment)
WEEE Directive (Waste Electrical and Electronic Equipment)
Environmental regulations relating to use, storage, discharge, site cleanup and disposal of hazardous chemicals
DFARS (Defense Federal Acquisition Regulation Supplement) requirements for controlled unclassified information (CUI)
CMMC (Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification) program requirements
International tax laws and regulations including Pillar Two global minimum tax
Inflation Reduction Act of 2022 including 15% alternative minimum tax (CAMT)
ERISA and Internal Revenue Code requirements for pension plans

sanction_risks: U.S. tariffs on products made in China and imported into United States (25% tariff on certain products, additional 10% tariff effective February 4, 2025)
China retaliatory tariffs on products made in United States
Potential additional tariffs from Trump administration on imports from Canada, Mexico and China
Export restrictions prohibiting U.S. companies from exporting to certain entities
Restrictions on access to U.S. origin technologies for certain Chinese semiconductor companies
Export controls for military end users or military end-use in China, Russia and Venezuela
Huawei and affiliates added to Entity List
Restrictions on sale of products to certain customers in China added to Entity List in December 2024
